backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining a chat backend with a `ChatMessage` type, storing up to 500 messages in memory, and exposing `getMessages(since)` and `postMessage` query/update calls.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature IDs to their associated source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels for build/audit tracking.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend architecture.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes (colors, radius, sidebar, charts) used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell titled 'Global Chat' that mounts the React app into a `#root` div via the `src/main.tsx` module entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that checks for an active session on mount and conditionally renders `LandingPage` or `ChatPage`, with a loading spinner and logout handler.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin panel sheet component with tabbed UI exposing 30 fun/moderation commands (ghost, VIP, freeze, balloon, weather, avatar color, spotlight, nickname, trivia, etc.) via the `useFunCommands` hook and individual state fields per command.
frontend/src/components/AIChatButton.tsx: Empty file — the floating G.AI Chat button component has been removed/disabled.
frontend/src/components/AIChatPanel.tsx: Empty file — the AI chat panel component has been removed/disabled.
Full-screen overlay that displays an animated birthday message with emoji for 5 seconds then disappears.
frontend/src/components/ChatArea.tsx: Scrollable message list that reads fun-mode state (rainbow, flip, bighead, shake, ghost, VIP, nicknames, avatar colors) from localStorage and a BroadcastChannel, applying visual effects to rendered messages in real time.
frontend/src/components/ConfettiBurst.ts: Renders 80 randomized confetti particles falling across the screen using CSS animation, auto-dismissing after 3 seconds.
frontend/src/components/ConfirmationToas: A fixed-position toast component that prompts the user to confirm a destructive action (e.g., delete) with a confirm button and dismiss button, auto-dismissing after 5 seconds.
A textarea-based message input bar that handles sending messages on Enter, auto-resizes, and blocks input with status messages when the user is banned or frozen (checked via localStorage and BroadcastChannel).
frontend/src/components/MOTDBanner.tsx: A dismissible banner displayed at the top of the chat showing a Message of the Day (MOTD) with a megaphone icon and close button.
frontend/src/components/OwnerShutdownBan: A banner shown to the owner during a server shutdown displaying a countdown timer, the shutdown message, and a 'Start Up Now' button.
frontend/src/components/PinnedMessageBar: A bar that displays a pinned chat message (looked up by ID from the messages array) with a pin icon and optional dismiss button.
frontend/src/components/SecretEmojiPicke: A hidden emoji picker panel with a curated grid of 'secret' emojis, toggled via Ctrl+Alt, that inserts the selected emoji and closes on Escape or outside click.
A full-screen black overlay shown to regular users when the server is shut down, displaying a pulsing red indicator, the shutdown message, and a countdown timer.
frontend/src/components/Sidebar.tsx: A Discord-style sidebar showing server name, text channels, and an online users list with VIP/owner badges, reading party mode and VIP state from localStorage via BroadcastChannel.
frontend/src/components/StartupOverlay.t: A full-screen green overlay with a spinning loader and bouncing dots shown while the server is starting up.
frontend/src/components/TopBar.tsx: A top navigation bar displaying the channel name, online count, an optional Admin Panel button, and a logout button, with party mode background animation support.
frontend/src/components/TypingIndicatorB: A small bar that shows animated bouncing dots and a '{user} is typing…' message, auto-hiding after 5 seconds via the onDone callback.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
Detects `@G.ai <question>` mentions in chat messages and sends an AI-generated response using OpenAI, posting the reply as a bot message.
Manages chat message state by polling the ICP backend for new messages, merging them with fingerprint-based deduplication, and syncing across tabs via BroadcastChannel.
frontend/src/hooks/useChatModeration.ts: Monitors incoming chat messages with OpenAI moderation, banning users who send flagged content and broadcasting a warning message to the chat.
Handles a Ctrl+C keyboard shortcut to prompt the user to confirm clearing the chat, with a 5-second timeout and Escape to dismiss.
frontend/src/hooks/useEmojiPickerShortcu: Toggles an emoji picker's visibility via a Ctrl+Alt keyboard shortcut.
frontend/src/hooks/useFunCommands.ts: Provides a set of fun chat commands (rainbow mode, confetti, flip chat, weather, mystery box, etc.) that broadcast effects and send bot messages to the chat.
frontend/src/hooks/useHighlights.ts: Manages active user highlight entries from admin state, subscribing to broadcast updates and pruning expired highlights every 10 seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functionality, persisting identity across page reloads using DFINITY's AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useMOTD.ts: Manages the Message of the Day state, subscribing to broadcast updates and allowing the user to locally dismiss the MOTD.
frontend/src/hooks/usePinnedMessages.ts: React hook that tracks the currently pinned message by reading from adminState and subscribing to broadcast events of type 'pinned'.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty compatibility stub indicating that data management is handled via useBroadcastMessages instead.
frontend/src/hooks/useShadowban.ts: React hook that tracks the shadowbanned users list and exposes whether a given username is shadowbanned, updating on broadcast events.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Inter font, sets up Tailwind, defines CSS custom properties for a dark theme, and declares custom animations (slide-in, rainbow text, shake, confetti, birthday pop).
frontend/src/lib/adminState.ts: Manages admin chat features (pinned messages, theme, slow mode, chat lock, MOTD, highlights, shadowban) using localStorage and BroadcastChannel for cross-tab sync.
frontend/src/lib/auth.ts: Handles user account creation, login, and session management using localStorage with basic base64 password obfuscation, and seeds a default 'AI.Caffeine' owner account.
frontend/src/lib/broadcastControl.ts: Singleton BroadcastChannel wrapper that manages a shared channel for admin control events, providing subscribe/unsubscribe and broadcast functions.
frontend/src/lib/exportChatLog.ts: Exports the chat message log from localStorage as a downloadable JSON file.
frontend/src/lib/modLog.ts: Manages a moderation log stored in localStorage, supporting get, add, and clear operations with a maximum of 100 entries.
frontend/src/lib/openai.ts: Provides OpenAI API key storage, a chat completion helper using gpt-4o-mini, and a content moderation function that flags disrespectful messages.
frontend/src/lib/serverState.ts: Manages server shutdown state via localStorage, supporting timed shutdowns (capped at 50 minutes), auto-restore on expiry, and countdown formatting utilities.
frontend/src/lib/userBadges.tsx: Defines a verified owner check for the 'AI.Caffeine' username and renders a crown badge component with a tooltip.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/ChatPage.tsx: Main chat page component that composes the sidebar, top bar, chat area, message input, admin panel, and fun overlays (confetti, birthday). Handles message sending, admin broadcasts, typing indicators, and BroadcastChannel-driven effects.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Authentication landing page with login and account-creation modes, using local auth helpers to validate credentials and set the active session before calling onJoin.
frontend/src/types/chat.ts: Defines the ChatMessage TypeScript interface with fields for id, username, text, timestamp, and optional flags like isBot, isBigMessage, isSystem, and isBroadcast.
frontend/src/utils/sampleMessages.ts: Generates a set of pre-seeded sample chat messages from fictional users and seeds them into localStorage if no messages exist yet.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a Discord-inspired color palette (plus neon and retro themes), Inter font, custom border radii, accordion animations, and plugins for animate, typography, and container queries.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 21) describing the app's architecture, existing features, known issues, and design decisions for a Discord-style global chat app with BroadcastChannel messaging, AI moderation, and an owner admin account.
